text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity. The modern lines of architecture, the glass wall, and the soft hum of fluorescent lights merge with the orderly display within. Entering the exhibition, the words "Responsive and rapidly evolving" draw me to ponder the intersection of human innovation and our environments. I feel a gentle optimism, inspired by the dedication to progress and reflection woven into this space. Surrounded by artifacts and text, I sense the promise and vulnerability of intentional design—its invitation for me to connect, contemplate, and grow alongside this curious world.
